_readme.what_this_is: Archetype MANIFEST for a multi-tenant SaaS / subscription app. Composes from the shared library (library/checkpoints/). Resolve with `node library/resolve.mjs archetype.saas.json`.
_readme.reuse: Only 3 checkpoints are SaaS-specific (saas.tenancy.isolation, saas.subscription.entitlement_integrity, saas.subscription.lifecycle); every other checkpoint — all of payment.*, auth.*, the universal security.*/data.*/reliability.* set, and the design.* set — is shared with other archetypes. This is the library paying off: archetype #2 is almost entirely reuse, and a new universal checkpoint added to the library lifts every archetype at once.
_readme.ids_are_contracts: Shared concerns are domain-neutral; SaaS-specific ones carry the saas. prefix. Versioned, never silently renamed.
_readme.how_scoring_works: Levels 3/6/9. 3 = present but crude/risky. 6 = solid, shippable. 9 = great. TRUST THE GAP, NOT THE NUMBER. Goal: 9 on critical, 6+ elsewhere.

applies_when: A multi-tenant subscription app: user accounts, tenant/org separation, and recurring billing.

goal_definition.honest_ceiling: design checkpoints tagged taste_limited verify to ~level 7 mechanically; reaching 9 requires human design review the rubric cannot replace.
